title: Exploration Config Schema
description: Defines exploration strategy, budget controls, and convergence criteria for optimization runs (TVL 0.9 exploration section).

ExplorationBudgets.description: Budget limits for the exploration run

max_trials.description: Maximum number of trial configurations to evaluate

max_spend_usd.description: Maximum total spend in USD across all trials

max_wallclock_s.description: Maximum wall-clock time in seconds for the optimization run

ConvergenceCriteria.description: Criteria for declaring convergence and stopping early

metric.description: Name of the metric to monitor for convergence

window.description: Number of recent trials to evaluate for convergence

threshold.description: Maximum allowed improvement within the window to declare convergence

strategy.description: Exploration strategy (string name like 'bayesian' or object with type and parameters)

convergence.description: Convergence stop criteria for early termination

max_parallel_trials.description: Maximum number of trials to run concurrently
